agent_use_rules: Use this pack as an image-asset routing summary, not as a decipherment result.
Open the cited asset index, rights log, technical profile, and visual profile rows before making any research claim.
Treat luma-threshold regions as preprocessing metadata only; they are not glyph segmentation or component analysis.
Retain each asset's object-page, API, or IIIF manifest provenance when reusing or discussing the images.
agent_use_rules_zh: 本上下文包只作为图像资产检索路由摘要使用，不是释读结果。
提出任何研究判断前，必须打开被引用的资产索引、权利日志、技术画像和视觉画像记录行。
亮度阈值区域只是预处理 metadata，不是字形切分或构件分析。
复用或讨论图像时必须保留每项资产的对象页、API 或 IIIF manifest 来源追溯。

rights_review.evidence: The Met Collection API object 42045 reports isPublicDomain=true and provides primaryImage URL https://images.metmuseum.org/CRDImages/as/original/LC-67_43_14_002.jpg
rights_review.notes: Public-domain object image committed as small source-marked sample asset; image interpretation still requires scholarly review.

assets.risk_note: The Met API marks object 42045 as public domain; retain object page/API provenance and do not treat the image as decipherment evidence without scholarly review.

visual_profile.caution: Algorithmic foreground candidate only; not glyph segmentation, component analysis, or paleographic interpretation.

rights_review.evidence: The Met Collection API object 42022 reports isPublicDomain=true and provides primaryImage URL https://images.metmuseum.org/CRDImages/as/original/LC-18_56_71_002.jpg
rights_review.notes: Public-domain object image committed as small source-marked sample asset; image interpretation still requires scholarly review.

assets.risk_note: The Met API marks object 42022 as public domain; retain object page/API provenance and do not treat the image as decipherment evidence without scholarly review.

visual_profile.caution: Algorithmic foreground candidate only; not glyph segmentation, component analysis, or paleographic interpretation.

rights_review.evidence: Smithsonian/NMAA official archive page reports CC0 for FSC-O-26 and the IIIF manifest for FS-FSC-O-26_1 reports Metadata Usage CC0 with image URL https://ids.si.edu/ids/iiif/FS-FSC-O-26_1/full/full/0/default.jpg
rights_review.notes: Public-domain object image committed as small source-marked sample asset; object metadata may be revised and image interpretation still requires scholarly review.

assets.risk_note: Smithsonian/NMAA archive page and IIIF manifest mark FSC-O-26 / FS-FSC-O-26_1 as CC0; retain object-page and manifest provenance and do not treat image metadata as decipherment evidence.

visual_profile.caution: Algorithmic foreground candidate only; not glyph segmentation, component analysis, or paleographic interpretation.

purpose: Entry-point context for AI Agents that need committed public-domain image assets, source provenance, rights review, and safe visual preprocessing metadata before opening the image files.
purpose_zh: 供 AI Agent 在打开图像文件前快速了解已提交公共领域图像资产、来源追溯、权利复核和安全视觉预处理 metadata 的入口上下文。
title: Public-Domain Image Asset Context Pack
title_zh: 公共领域图像资产上下文包
